mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO MEMBER ( MEMBER_NO, MEMBER_ID, MEMBER_PWD, MEMBER_NAME, MEMBER_ADDRESS, PHONE, EMAIL, MEMBER_JOIN_DATE, MEMBER_ACTIVE_YN ) VALUES ( SEQ_MEMBER.NEXTVAL, #{memberId}, #{memberPwd}, #{memberName}, #{address}, #{phone}, #{email}, DEFAULT, DEFAULT )
SELECT SEQ_MEMBER.CURRVAL FROM DUAL

SELECT SEQ_PET.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO PET ( PET_NO, MEMBER_NO, PET_TYPE, PET_NAME, PET_AGE, PET_WEIGHT, PET_PHOTO ) VALUES ( #{petNo}, #{memberNo}, #{petType}, #{petName}, #{petAge}, #{petWeight}, #{petPhoto} )
